title: Should you chase IPOs?
question: Do new listings pay off if you buy in the aftermarket?
finding: No — chasing IPOs loses to the market by ~28% a year. 760 US IPOs since 2022-10: a day-1-close entry held one year returned a median −28% vs SPY (CI [−43%, −25%]); only 19% beat the index. Just REITs and profitable software survived.
